[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A group of people pose in a roadside lineup with multiple scooters and cars under a clear blue sky.

Main Subject: A group of people stands and sits along the side of a road next to a white SUV and several scooters, with some individuals standing and others seated on scooter seats or near the vehicles.

Setting: The scene is outdoors on a paved road with a painted lane line visible in the foreground, and leafy green trees fill the background. The lighting suggests daytime with bright, even sunlight and a clear sky with a few light clouds.

Visual Details: The camera angle is low to mid-height, looking across the road toward the group. The white SUV occupies the right side of the frame, with its front end and headlights visible. Several scooters are arranged along the left and center, including one green scooter near the middle. People wear mostly dark outfits, with some in long-sleeve tops and pants and others in lighter casual clothing. One person stands near the left side with an arm extended; several others wear caps or hats and pose while seated on scooters or standing beside the vehicles. The road surface is gray asphalt, and the lane line runs diagonally across the bottom right portion of the image.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a group posing outdoors beside a white SUV and multiple scooters along a roadside. The background features green trees and a bright blue daytime sky.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- No visible, legible text detected.

# Notes

- The image appears to show people and vehicles outdoors, but there is no clear UI text, captions, or readable signage/text present.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
